description: Full-featured event scheduler with month, week, day, agenda, and timeline views. Supports client-side event lists or server-side data providers, drag-and-drop event moving, resource grouping, context menus, and custom event templates.

parameters.name: Events
parameters.description: Client-side event list. Alternative to DataProvider.

parameters.name: DataProvider
parameters.description: Server-side data provider. Takes priority over Events if both are set.

parameters.name: View
parameters.description: Active view type.

parameters.name: ViewChanged
parameters.description: Fires when the view type changes.

parameters.name: CurrentDate
parameters.description: Currently displayed date (determines visible range).

parameters.name: CurrentDateChanged
parameters.description: Fires when navigation changes the date.

parameters.name: SelectedDate
parameters.description: Currently selected date.

parameters.name: SelectedDateChanged
parameters.description: Fires when a date is selected.

parameters.name: OnEventClick
parameters.description: Fires when an event is clicked.

parameters.name: OnSlotClick
parameters.description: Fires when an empty time slot is clicked.

parameters.name: OnEventChanged
parameters.description: Fires after an event is moved or resized via drag and drop.

parameters.name: OnSlotContextMenu
parameters.description: Fires when right-clicking on an empty time slot.

parameters.name: OnEventContextMenu
parameters.description: Fires when right-clicking on an event.

parameters.name: Resources
parameters.description: Resources for grouping (timeline/resource views).

parameters.name: FirstDayOfWeek
parameters.description: First day of week (0=Sun, 1=Mon). Default: 1 (Monday).

parameters.name: WorkDayStart
parameters.description: Work day start time.

parameters.name: WorkDayEnd
parameters.description: Work day end time.

parameters.name: SlotDuration
parameters.description: Slot duration in minutes for day/week views.

parameters.name: ReadOnly
parameters.description: Whether events are read-only (no drag/resize).

parameters.name: EventTemplate
parameters.description: Custom event template.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS class(es).

examples.title: Basic month view with static events
examples.code: <TmScheduler Events="@_events" View="TmScheduleViewType.Month" CurrentDate="DateTime.Today" CurrentDateChanged="@(d => _currentDate = d)" OnEventClick="@HandleEventClick" />

examples.title: Week view with server-side data provider and resources
examples.code: <TmScheduler DataProvider="@_dataProvider" View="TmScheduleViewType.Week" Resources="@_resources" SlotDuration="30" FirstDayOfWeek="1" OnSlotClick="@HandleNewEvent" OnEventChanged="@HandleEventMoved" />
